old_column.content: Styled API for creating atomic, theme-aware component styling.

old_column.content: In modern web development, we have lots of solutions and architectures that have

new_column.content: In modern web development, we have lots of solutions and architectures that have

old_column.content: - Size: It has different size variations (small, medium, large)

new_column.content: - Size: It has different size variations (small, medium, large)

old_column.content: - Variant: It has different visual style (outline, solid, ghost)

new_column.content: - Variant: It has different visual style (outline, solid, ghost)

old_column.content: - Color scheme (Optional): For a given variant, it can have several color
